title: Nachos
excerpt: For Lize Beekman I made one of our family's favourites. It sounds like a lot of work but it isn't.
html: For Lize  Beekman I made one of our family's favourites.  It sounds like a lot of work but it isn't.

items: olive oil for frying the mince

steps: Fry the mince until brown in the olive oil.
Add the cumin and paprika and fry for a bit longer.
Season with salt and pepper and fry until done.
Put half the Doritos chips into a nice flat dish that can go into the oven.
Spoon the mince over the chips.
Sprinkle the cheddar and feta cheese over the mince and bake in the oven until the cheese has melted.
Spoon the sour cream onto the cheese.
Make a guacamole by mixing the avocado, a handful of finely chopped fresh coriander, lemon juice and zest.
Season with salt and pepper to taste and spoon it on top of the sour cream.
Make a salsa with the finely chopped onion, tomato and chilli by mixing it together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste and spoon it on top of the guacamole.
Arrange the rest of the chips around the dish and enjoy.
